title: Claude Fable 5 上线 OpenRouter
full_text:
OpenRouter on X: "Claude Fable 5 from @AnthropicAI is live on OpenRouter!
Anthropic's most capable coding model, built for long-running, ambiguous work: legacy migrations, gnarly production bugs and async sessions that run for hours or days. SOTA on nearly all tested benchmarks. https://t.co/HLL5tyNLaq" / X
